long_description:
To resolve the corrupted file system of /dev/loop0 in new mzonepb2
steps :

gt all "sudo umount /home/tanium_overlay_mnt" -u sysop

gt all "sudo rm /home/tanium_overlay" -u sysop

Only Thanos config deployment

reboot all node : gt all "sudo reboot" -u sysop
short_description: To resolve the corrupted file system of /dev/loop0 in new mzonepb2
